subcodes.first_line: This is a missive unto Abdullah, who hath been named Ali in Our Most Great and Glorious Kingdom, and who hath attained unto Our presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب الی عبد الله الذی سمی بعلی فی ملکوتنا الاعظم العظیم و حضر تلقاء
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
